## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Docker version: [e.g. 27.0]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126]

## Logs
```
Paste relevant logs from: docker compose logs <service-name>
```
